reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: This is one of the worst schools of faridabad actually it is so downgraded that the environment it provides destroy the mind of children there is zero communication and teacher treat students very brutely... teachers always do gender discrimination that's why there is so much of bad conversation skills among students...this school is more like some 80s or 90s type govt school...and yeah if we talk about facilities there literally nothing...no sports activity, no mun, no proper facilities in classrooms....teachers here are so illiterate...I will not even recommend this school to anyone.... dynasty intl school is lacking behind among all the modern schools nowadays....there should be change...the teachers should be replaced....this school is literally destroying the mindset of youth...*NOT recommended*

reviews.author: Neera
reviews.review_body:
A school with an excellent infrastructure, well equipped library, sports facilities, extra curricular activities, hardworking, well experienced and humble staff
for overall development of the child.
Management is also very cooperative.                Wishing for the great future of the school.

reviews.author: Kritika Sorot
reviews.review_body:
I'm impressed with the school's commitment to providing a well-rounded education. The teachers are dedicated, enthusiastic, and maintain excellent communication with parents. The school's focus on holistic development aligns with our family's values.

The school's facilities are well-maintained, and the extracurricular activities have helped my child develop new skills and interests. The administration is approachable, and concerns are addressed promptly.

reviews.author: Varun Singla
reviews.review_body:
Once dynasty was TTPS.
MISS THOSE DAYS.

reviews.author: LightBulb
reviews.review_body:
From zenith to nadir, this school has downgraded in last few years especially after the demise of Smt. Bimla Varma.
1. Let me quote an example: Teachers of class 5 and 6 do not check homework notebooks.They don't complete the course but give that in syllabus of exams.
How can a teacher of class 5,6,7 don't pay any heed to homework they give. This fact can be verified from any student.
This is one of the few examples...but quality has downgraded so quickly.
2. No sports infrastructure.
3. Frequent teacher change.
4. Low quality staff.
5. No effect of any suggestion.

reviews.author: Priyank Kapur
reviews.review_body: Our experience at Dynasty has been exceptional. The teachers are truly invested in my child’s education and her growth as a learner. Adjustments are made as needed to meet the needs of the student. Also, the teachers are super supportive and amazing. I’ve never worried about my child while she is under their care and guidance. They are not just teaching but nurturing my child.

reviews.author: romita shaw
reviews.review_body:
Hello all,
I am a single parent and my kid has been studying over here since class 1st, now in 6th. So it is a nice experience with all the staffs. Main thing is that every teacher have been so cooperative and helpful to my kid. I look forward that my child completes her 12th from here. The location is closed and very convenient to reach from the highway and from the inside area of sec 28. Everyone is really helpful...including drivers as well....to drop your kid safely. Fee structure is also affordable.

reviews.author: Deepak Kapoor
reviews.review_body:
School teachers are very cooperative and teach children very well
Extra co curricular activities are also good

reviews.author: Sunidhi Vats
reviews.review_body:
School not only means to provide children academic grades but also to inculcate confidence in both kids and parents

Kids confidence for study, discipline, moral boost and parents confidence for healthy and sound environment... I recommend DIS for those who wants their kids to perform top in both academically and socially
